memberdef.argsstring: (struct metal_device *device, const char *property_name, void *output, int len)
memberdef.name: metal_linux_get_device_property

briefdescription.para: Compare two strings in the reversed order.This function compares only the last "Count" number of characters of Str1Ptr and Str2Ptr.

parameterdescription.para: is base address of first string
is base address of second string
is number of last characters to be compared between Str1Ptr and Str2Ptr

simplesect.para: 0 if last "Count" number of bytes matches between Str1Ptr and Str2Ptr, else difference in unmatched character.

briefdescription.para: Traverse "/sys/bus/platform/device" directory, to find RFDC device entry, corresponding to provided device id.

detaileddescription.para: If device entry corresponding to said device id is found, store it in output buffer DevNamePtr.

parameterdescription.para: is base address of char array, where device name will be stored
contains the ID of the device to look up the RFDC device name entry in "/sys/bus/platform/device"

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if device entry not found for given device id.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: A table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

DeviceId
contains the ID of the device to look up the configuration for.
A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID was not found. See xrfdc.h for the definition of XRFdc_Config.

briefdescription.para: Register/open the deviceand map RFDC to the IO region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the ID of the device to register/map
is a pointer to the metal device.
